# DeviceSync slang dictionaries

The files `ru_slang.txt` and `en_slang.txt` are small, project-authored lists of common
abbreviations and informal words. They were not copied from a proprietary keyboard, private
message corpus or third-party dataset.

Dataset license: CC0-1.0.

The lists contain words and integer ranking weights only. They may be replaced or expanded only
from a source whose provenance and license are documented before distribution.
